words.zh: n. 笑聲( laugh的名詞複數 ); 笑態; 笑料

words.def: the residue that remains when something is burned

(astronomy) the angular distance of a celestial point measured westward along the celestial equator from the zenith crossing; the right ascension for an observer at a particular location and time of day
words.zh: have的第三人稱單數現在式

words.def: the state of matter distinguished from the solid and liquid states by: relatively low density and viscosity; relatively great expansion and contraction with changes in pressure and temperature; the ability to diffuse readily; and the spontaneous tendency to become distributed uniformly throughout any container
words.zh: n. 氣體, 汽油, 瓦斯
